name: Filled Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a small skillet, cook the shredded carrot, finely chopped celery, and onion until tender.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into greased muffin cups.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Let cool before serving.
